data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding access enforcement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to 'Minimum necessary' access enforcement. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or records that confirm the enforcement of access controls or the expected outcomes of the scenario. The linked use cases and prior steps focus on booking confirmations and customer interactions without addressing the specific requirement of access enforcement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of access enforcement behavior.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify access enforcement.
